# Privacy Skills

> Open-source agent skills for checking privacy risks before sensitive data is uploaded, shared, logged, automated, or used with AI.

## What is Privacy Skills?

Privacy Skills is a collection of open-source agent skill definitions for GitHub Copilot and compatible AI tools. Each skill guides an AI agent through a practical, plain-language privacy review for a specific topic.

The project is built and maintained by Berrysbay (https://www.berrysbay.com).

## Who it helps

- Individuals who want to check whether something is safe to upload, share, or post
- Teams building AI governance, policies, and training
- Developers and architects reviewing systems, APIs, logs, and AI integrations for privacy risks

## Main topics covered

- AI data exposure and ChatGPT privacy
- Uploading documents and content to AI tools
- Screenshot and photo privacy
- Meeting recording and AI note-taker risks
- Email and cloud sharing privacy
- Staff AI use policy and governance
- Approved AI tools register and shadow AI
- Vendor and contractor data sharing
- Privacy incident first response
- Application logging and observability PII
- API and webhook privacy
- RAG systems and vector database privacy
- Prompt injection risks
- Data minimisation and retention
- Privacy by design
- Form and data collection review
- OAuth scope minimisation
- Third-party SDK and integration review

## Where skills live

Each skill is in `skills/[skill-name]/SKILL.md`.

The agent instruction file is `skills/[skill-name]/SKILL.md`.
The human-readable summary is `skills/[skill-name]/README.md`.

### Everyday privacy skills
- skills/before-you-upload-check/
- skills/screenshot-privacy-check/
- skills/form-privacy-check/
- skills/safe-sharing-version/
- skills/minimum-data-needed/
- skills/ai-upload-decision-check/
- skills/meeting-recording-privacy-check/
- skills/public-case-study-sanitiser/
- skills/email-privacy-check/
- skills/linkedin-post-privacy-check/
- skills/cloud-storage-sharing-check/
- skills/ai-meeting-notes-check/
- skills/photo-metadata-privacy-check/

### Team and governance skills
- skills/ai-data-exposure-check/
- skills/sensitive-document-workflow-review/
- skills/data-flow-mapping/
- skills/governance-framework-builder/
- skills/safe-ai-use-policy-builder/
- skills/approved-ai-tools-register/
- skills/privacy-incident-first-response/
- skills/vendor-data-sharing-review/
- skills/contractor-data-access-review/
- skills/ai-tool-onboarding-privacy-check/
- skills/data-retention-policy-builder/
- skills/privacy-impact-assessment-starter/
- skills/staff-ai-training-checklist/

### Developer and architecture skills
- skills/logging-privacy-review/
- skills/ai-rag-privacy-review/
- skills/api-privacy-review/
- skills/privacy-by-design-review/
- skills/architecture-privacy-review/
- skills/data-minimisation-review/

- skills/third-party-sdk-data-review/
- skills/observability-pii-audit/
- skills/oauth-scope-minimisation/
- skills/webhook-privacy-review/

## Where question docs live

Question-based documentation is in `docs/`:

- docs/index.md — full index of skills and questions
- docs/everyday/ — questions for individuals and everyday use
- docs/teams/ — questions for managers and governance teams
- docs/developers/ — questions for engineers and architects

### Everyday questions
- docs/everyday/can-i-upload-this-to-ai.md
- docs/everyday/what-should-i-blur-in-a-screenshot.md
- docs/everyday/should-this-meeting-be-recorded.md

### Team questions
- docs/teams/how-to-build-an-ai-use-policy.md
- docs/teams/how-to-manage-shadow-ai.md
- docs/teams/what-to-do-if-data-was-emailed-by-mistake.md

### Developer questions
- docs/developers/are-we-logging-pii.md
- docs/developers/how-do-embeddings-expose-sensitive-documents.md
- docs/developers/does-our-api-return-too-much-data.md

## Important note

These skills are educational and practical review tools. They are not legal advice, security certification, or a replacement for professional privacy, legal, or security review.

## About

Berrysbay website: https://www.berrysbay.com
